Iriss.bio1: IRISS is one of the best-known voices on the used-car trade in Latvian social media. More than 10 years in used-car sales and imports from Europe bring deep knowledge of brands, their weak points, and real market conditions.
Iriss.bio2: You get a direct view of the car you’re eyeing from someone who sees through listing tricks and what sellers often leave unsaid.

pillars.title: Market transparency
pillars.body: For over a decade my day-to-day work has been behind the scenes of the used-car trade — so I can spot hidden risks and seller tricks.

pillars.title: Independent assessment
pillars.body: I don’t partner with other dealers; my only goal is to protect clients from financially unjustified decisions.

pillars.title: In-depth analysis
pillars.body: While standard history reports only give dry facts, I connect them with the model’s weak points and market value, offering a full conclusion.
